meta.title: Mohamed Bouliani | Cinematic Portfolio
meta.description: Designer. Photographer. Filmmaker. Audio Engineer. Crafting powerful brands and immersive cinematic experiences.

home.heroSubtitle: A multi-talented creative. A journey that began at age 6 and transformed into an endless passion for design, photography, development, and innovation.
home.addFromAdmin: Add some from the admin panel
home.servicesDesc: Combining over 20 years of experience in design, photography, video production, audio engineering, and programming to create exceptional creative experiences.
home.chapter1Text: At age 6, while most children were playing, I was exploring the world of digital design. I began a self-learning journey that would never stop. The computer was my window to a limitless world of creativity.
home.chapter2Text: Over more than a decade, I learned and mastered graphic design in all its forms, professional photography, video creation and editing, motion graphics, audio engineering, and interior design. Every day was a new lesson in an endless journey.
home.chapter3Text: I took courses at top American universities like Harvard and the University of Maryland. I trained with tech giants: Google, Amazon, Microsoft, IBM, Oracle, Adobe. I earned certifications from Coursera and Udemy.
home.chapter4Text: I launched my professional career in the design world. Every project was a new challenge, and every client was an opportunity to prove that passion can become a craft.
home.chapter5Text: I earned my Baccalaureate and studied Law, but realized it wasn't my calling. I decided to join 1337 coding school in Benguerir and Khouribga, where I found my true passion in programming.
home.chapter6Text: Today I work as a multidisciplinary freelancer. I combine graphic design, photography, video production, audio engineering, full-stack development, cybersecurity, and IT services. Every project is a new chapter in my story.
home.skillsDesignDesc: Mastery of all design types: Visual Identity, Marketing & Advertising, UI Design, Publication, Packaging, Motion Graphics, Event Design, Environmental Design, Illustration, Information Design, Typography, Generative Design, Brand Identity, UX Design, Broadcast Design, and Film Design.
home.skillsPhotoDesc: Professional cinematic photography that tells powerful visual stories.
home.skillsVideoDesc: Professional video creation and editing with motion effects and advanced visual effects.
home.skillsAudioDesc: Professional sound design, music production, mixing and mastering.
home.skillsDevDesc: Full-stack developer, cybersecurity engineer, specialist in all IT services.
home.skillsEventsDesc: Skills in organizing events, festivals, and major gatherings.
home.skillsDecorDesc: Creative design and implementation of décor for spaces and events.

about.title: Mohamed
about.intro: A multidisciplinary creative who began his journey at age 6. Combining over 20 years of learning and creativity in design, photography, production, and programming.
about.bio1: My journey with digital creativity began at age 6 in 2003. Self-learning was my constant companion. I explored the world of graphic design in all its branches: from visual identity to cinematic design, through marketing, UI, packaging, and motion graphics.
about.bio2: I didn't stop at design. I learned professional photography, video creation and editing, motion effects, audio engineering, and interior design. I took courses at Harvard and the University of Maryland, trained with Google, Amazon, Microsoft, IBM, Oracle, and Adobe.
about.bio3: After my Baccalaureate in 2015, I studied Law but found my true passion in programming. I joined 1337 school in Benguerir and Khouribga. Today, I work as a multidisciplinary freelancer: designer, photographer, video producer, audio engineer, full-stack developer, cybersecurity engineer, and event organizer.
about.quote: Every pixel has a purpose. Every frequency has an intention. Every frame tells a story. Every line of code builds a future. My work isn't just creation —
about.expertise1Desc: Mastery of all graphic design types: Visual Identity, Marketing, UI Design, Publications, Packaging, Motion Graphics, Events, Environmental Design, Illustration, Information Design, Typography, Generative Design, Brand Identity, UX, Broadcast, and Film Design.
about.expertise1Tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign · After Effects · Figma · XD
about.expertise2Desc: Professional cinematic photography that tells visual stories. Portraits, reports, product and event photography.
about.expertise2Tools: Lightroom · Photoshop · Capture One · Camera RAW
about.expertise3Desc: Professional video creation and editing, motion effects, motion graphics and cinematic visual effects.
about.expertise3Tools: Premiere Pro · After Effects · DaVinci Resolve · Cinema 4D
about.expertise4Desc: Professional sound design, music production, recording, mixing and mastering for films, ads, and podcasts.
about.expertise4Tools: Ableton Live · Pro Tools · Logic Pro · FL Studio
about.expertise5Desc: Full-stack developer, Cybersecurity engineer, specialist in all types of IT services.
about.expertise5Tools: Next.js · React · Node.js · Python · TypeScript · Linux
about.expertise6Desc: Organizing events, festivals, and major gatherings. Creative design and implementation of décor for spaces and events.
about.expertise6Tools: AutoCAD · SketchUp · Event Planning · Project Management
about.timeline1Desc: At age 6, began self-learning in digital design and creativity
about.timeline2Desc: Started professional work in graphic design as a freelancer
about.timeline3Desc: Baccalaureate, Law studies, then joined 1337 coding school
about.timeline4Desc: Multidisciplinary freelancer: design, photo, video, audio, dev, cybersecurity
